splits.title: Mothers in Israel
splits.start_boundary: Mothers in Israel. Here are additional items from
splits.end_boundary: Truly your friend and sister in the gospel, Margaret McIntire Burgess.

files.notes: This file contains the main Roosevelt article featuring portraits and biographies of mothers with many children, followed by a separate 'Mothers in Israel' section with additional historical material from Sister Burgess about early Mormon pioneers in Nauvoo and St. George.

splits.start_boundary: JOHN ST. JOHN. Nephi Anderson has written another
splits.end_boundary: commend it to all our readers.

splits.title: February Home Entertainment
splits.author: Morag
splits.start_boundary: February Home Entertainment. Morag. Birthday Calendar. Feb. 4

files.notes: The file contains three distinct articles: a short story about Valentine's Day, a book review of 'John St. John' by Nephi Anderson, and a home entertainment guide for February activities. The story is complete and well-bounded, the book review is brief but complete, and the entertainment guide provides February birthday calendar and program suggestions.

splits.title: Guide Lessons
splits.start_boundary: Guide Lessons. LESSON I. Theology and Testimony.
splits.end_boundary: All subjects treated in our Correspondence Course will be given. You are all invited to attend.

files.notes: This file contains a single Guide Lessons section that includes Lesson I (Theology and Testimony - Domestic Life Among the Nephites), Lesson II (Work and Business), Lesson III (Genealogy and Literature - Japheth, His Descendants and Tribes), Lesson IV (Home Economics), plus an Aztec mother's advice text and a housekeepers' conference announcement. All content appears to be part of one comprehensive Guide Lessons article rather than separate articles.
